results.title: Man who helped grow cannabis in Worcester to be deported after prison sentence
results.description: An Albanian national will be deported from the UK after he admitted to cultivating cannabis plants in Worcester

results.title: Kiley fires back at Democratic opponent Pan, challenges him to 5 debates
results.description: SACRAMENTO, Calif. — U.S. Rep. Kevin Kiley fired back at former state Sen. Richard Pan on Monday afternoon, criticizing the Democrat’s record and challenging him to five debates in the months leading up to the November election. Kiley’s response came...

results.title: New Arbroath and Broughty Ferry MP says she ‘won’t be the last’ after Westminster oath gesture
results.description: Lara Bird appeared to cross her fingers while swearing allegiance to the King.

results.title: Disagreement over nuclear inspections clouds U.S.-Iran teams work to finalize a war-ending deal
results.description: The U.S. and Iran were in dispute Tuesday over whether Tehran had agreed to allow UN inspectors to view bombed Iranian nuclear sites, as officials mediated talks on a permanent end to their war and violence broke out again in Lebanon.
